texto: Fate is never fair. You are caught in a current much stronger than you are
autor: struggle against it and you'll drown not just yourself but those who try to save you. Swim with it. and you'll survive
explicacao: Citação de struggle against it and you'll drown not just yourself but those who try to save you. Swim with it. and you'll survive sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Fate is never fair. You are caught in a current much stronger than you are” articula reflexao, cassandra-clare, city-of-ashes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como city-of-ashes.
